semanticCore: Small kindnesses, basic household tools, charity tax, flowing water, or easy utility

keyDerivations.meaning: Small kindnesses, basic tools (pots, buckets, salt), minimal charity, or utility items

figurativeOrRareUsages: وَيَمْنَعُونَ الْمَاعُونَ (107:7): And they prevent/refuse small kindnesses (or household assistance to neighbors).
discardedNoise: Ma'in (clear spring water) - distinct derivation M-Y-N.
summaryEn: The root signifies basic tools or small kindnesses (Ma'un), censuring hypocrites who show off in prayers but refuse to assist neighbors with simple domestic items.
summaryAr: يمثل هذا الجذر الشيء القليل النفع، والماعون هو ما يستعيره الجيران كالفأس والقدر والماء والملح والزكاة المفروضة (معن)، ذامّاً البخلاء الذين يمنعون عن الناس أبسط أنواع المساعدة.
rawText: أَمْعَنَ 4 He (a horse) went far, (S, Msb, K,) in his run. (S, Msb.) === Hence, أَمْعَنَ فِى الطَّلَبِ He went very far in search: (Msb:) or he went far, or to a great or an extraordinary length, therein. (Mgh.) === امعن فِى الشَّىْءِ, (Ham p. 817,) or فِى الأَمْرِ, (MA, K, Har p. 176,) He went far, (K, Ham, Har,) or deep, or beyond bounds, (MA,) in, or into, the thing, or affair. (Ham, &c.) === أَمْعَنَ لِى بِحَقِّى: see أَذَعْنَ. المَعْنُ The drawing of water.
